Description: Time until rodent fully enters EB (s).
To generate file in SimBA: Analyze ROI Data: Aggregates', check 'Include video length data'
Script method: Extracts video duration, assumes that video trimmed to end when rat fully enters EB.

Description: Time until rodent head first enters EB ROI (s).
To generate file in SimBA: Analyze ROI Data: Aggregates', check 'Detailed ROI bout data (sequences)'
Script method: Finds first START TIME for ROI 1.

Description: Total distance travelled by rodent center until fully enters EB (m).
Script method: Aggregate path length for entire video.

Description: Total distance travelled by rodent center until head enters EB ROI (m).
To generate file in SimBA: Analyze Distances/Velocity: Time Bins', with 1 second bins.
Script method: Rounds primary latency to nearest second, and sums path length timebins up to that point.

Description: Score out of 11, based on sequence of ROIs entered by rodent head.
To generate file in SimBA: 'Analyze ROI Data: Aggregates', check 'Detailed ROI bout data (sequences)'
Script method: Finds sequence of ROIs visited, dismissing instances where the same ROI is visited multiple times in a row. Calculates score based on search_tests.R and returns search type (direct, serial, etc.).

Description: Number of non-EB ROIs entered before fully entering EB.
To generate file in SimBA: 'Analyze ROI Data: Aggregates', check 'Detailed ROI bout data (sequences)'
Script method: Uses sequence, and finds total number of ROIs (except ROI 1) visited throughout video.

Description: Number of hole ROIs entered before locating EB ROI.
To generate file in SimBA: 'Analyze ROI Data: Aggregates', check 'Detailed ROI bout data (sequences)'
Script method: Uses sequence, and finds number of ROIs visited before the first instance of ROI 1.
